name: Lime Chicken Strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the chicken into 1/2 x 1-1/2-inch strips.
2. In a large mixing bowl, combine all of the ingredients and refrigerate.
Marinate overnight.
3. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
4. Pour the marinade into a bowl and set aside.
5. Place the chicken in a shallow baking dish and bake for 45 minutes.
6. Pour the marinade over the chicken and bake for another 45 minutes,
tossing every 10 minutes to coat thoroughly.
7. Cook until golden brown.
8. Serve hot.
Calories: 24, Carbs: 2g, Protein: 3g, Cholesterol: 6mg, Fat: .4g/13%
(analyzed per piece)
Source: Great Food - by Julee Rosso
